context: Realistic: exchange rates loaded at import time become stale in long-lived processes

checklist.name: Catches stale rate data
checklist.description: Identifies that exchange rates are loaded from the database once at module import time and cached in a module-level variable, meaning rate updates are never picked up in long-lived production processes until the service is restarted

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it adds payment amount calculations using cached data
